title: lichen-tui: Terminal user interface
description:
Rust TUI for LICHEN using ratatui.

Features:
- Split pane: contacts/channels left, messages right
- Real-time message updates
- Position map (ASCII art or sixel if supported)
- Node status bar
- Keyboard-driven navigation

Implementation:
- Rust with ratatui + crossterm
- Async (tokio) for CoAP and UI
- Same CoAP client as CLI
- Config file for keybindings, colors

Target: terminal users, SSH access, low-bandwidth remote.
close_reason: ratatui TUI scaffold shipped: split-pane contacts+messages, Tab/jk nav, status bar, lichen-tui binary
